Article Title: Maribel Nadal: Rafael Nadal’s sister Maribel shares emotional reaction as Martin Landaluce beats Sebastian Korda in Miami Open run
Article Text:
Rafael Nadal’s sister Maribel shares emotional reaction as Martin Landaluce beats Sebastian Korda in Miami Open run (Image via Getty)

Martin Landaluce fights back against Sebastian Korda and opens up about grandmother, Rafael Nadal and Carlos Alcaraz support





Martin Landaluce gave everyone a moment to remember at the 2026 Miami Open. The 20-year-old from Spain, who trains at Rafael Nadal Academy, is now in his first ATP Masters 1000 quarterfinal. He got there after a big fight-back win over Sebastian Korda. Even more special, Rafael Nadal’s sister, Maribel Nadal, shared a rare public message. She posted on Instagram, “👏 Congratulations Martin Landaluce 👏 We were so excited to see you play! 🤗.” Landaluce’s run has surprised many people. He came through qualifying and has already beaten three seeded players. Now, suddenly, he is one of the biggest stories in Miami.The fourth-round match against Sebastian Korda did not start well for Martin Landaluce.Korda, ranked World No. 36, took control early and won the first set 6-2. It looked like the match could end quickly.But things changed in the second set. Korda even had a match point, but he could not finish it. That moment gave Landaluce a chance. The young Spaniard stayed calm, pushed the set into a tiebreak, and won it 7-6(6).From there, the match completely turned. Landaluce played with more belief in the third set and closed it 6-4.With that, he sealed a 2-6, 7-6(6), 6-4 win and reached his first Masters 1000 quarterfinal.After the match, his emotions were clear. He spoke about his grandmother, who passed away a few months ago.“My grandmother. She (would have been) 101 last week, and she passed away a few months ago. I wanted to give her the victory.”Landaluce also shared how much help he has received from top Spanish players. He said he stays in touch with both Rafael Nadal and Carlos Alcaraz.“I speak with Carlitos and Rafa from time to time. I spoke with Rafa in Lled. We had a conversation that helped me a lot. I’ve seen Carlos some days. They’re both really nice people, always willing to support and help Spanish tennis grow.”Rafael Nadal himself recently praised the youngster. He said, “He has taken a step forward. I think he has some spectacular shots and he needs to keep improving some small things that will make a big difference.”Now, Martin Landaluce moves into the quarterfinal where he will face Jiri Lehecka, the No. 21 seed. It will be his biggest test yet, but after this comeback, he has already shown he is ready for big moments.
Article Summary: Rafael nadal’s sister maribel shares emotional reaction as martin landaluce beats sebastian korda in miami open run. The 20-year-old from spain, who trains at rafael nadal academy, is now in his first atp masters 1000 quarterfinal. He will face jiri lehecka, the no. 21 seed.

Article Title: 'What's wrong?': David Warner loses cool at PSL captains’ presser - Watch
Article Text:
David Warner loses cool at PSL captains’ presser (Screengrab photo)

Watch RCB’s big changes ahead of IPL: New rules, tribute & squad update RCB’s big changes ahead of IPL: New rules, tribute & squad update





NEW DELHI: The Pakistan Super League (PSL) 2026 has already been in the spotlight for several off-field issues even before the tournament begins. From a fuel crisis to scheduling changes, the buildup has been far from smooth.Now, an awkward moment at the captains’ press conference has added to the drama.During the pre-tournament media interaction on Wednesday, Karachi Kings captain David Warner appeared visibly annoyed with fellow captains who were chatting and laughing while he was speaking.As he discussed his team’s chances, he suddenly paused and called them out. "What's wrong? Sorry, gentlemen, we have got school kids here," he said.Watch:The comment highlighted his frustration over the lack of attention and professionalism during the event.Beyond the press conference incident, the tournament itself is dealing with major challenges.Due to a fuel crisis linked to ongoing tensions in West Asia, the Pakistan Cricket Board has decided to hold matches with restrictions and limit travel.PCB chairman Mohsin Naqvi explained the situation, saying, "The Prime Minister requested all of Pakistan to restrict their movements because of the fuel crisis. We closed schools and instituted work from home and increased the number of Eid holidays.We don't know how long this war will last."As a result, the PSL has been scaled down, with matches now set to be played only in Lahore and Karachi instead of multiple venues.The opening ceremony has also been cancelled.Despite all the disruptions, the tournament is scheduled to begin on March 26 and run until May 3, though uncertainties still remain around how smoothly it will be conducted.
Article Summary: Pakistan super league (psl) 2026 has already been in the spotlight for several off-field issues. Karachi kings captain david warner appeared visibly annoyed with fellow captains who were chatting and laughing while he was speaking. The tournament is scheduled to begin on march 26 and run until may 3.

Article Title: Vanessa Trump: Golf legend Tiger Woods seen with girlfriend Vanessa Trump in public moment before comeback game as Kai Trump cheers in stands
Article Text:
Golf legend Tiger Woods seen with girlfriend Vanessa Trump in public moment before comeback game as Kai Trump cheers in stands (Image via Getty)

Tiger Woods returns at TGL finals as Vanessa Trump and Kai Trump cheer from stands during comeback match





Tiger Woods made his return to competitive golf after more than a year, and this time, it was not just about the game. Just before he stepped onto the course, Vanessa Trump stood beside him, showing her support in a very personal way. The two shared a quick kiss and hug, a moment that caught attention right away. It happened on Tuesday, March 24, at the TGL finals in Palm Beach Gardens, Florida. This was a big moment for Woods. The 50-year-old golfer had been away from full competition since April 2024 due to injuries. So when he finally returned, people were already watching closely. And with Vanessa Trump there, along with her daughter Kai Trump, the moment felt even more special.Vanessa, who was earlier married to Donald Trump Jr., has been quietly dating Woods for the past few months. Now, their bond is becoming more public, and this appearance made that clear.Tiger Woods played for Jupiter Links in the TGL finals, facing Los Angeles Golf Club in a best-of-three series. Just before he teed off at the SoFi Center, Vanessa Trump walked up to him, hugged him, and gave him a kiss. It was simple, but it showed strong support before a big match.During the game, Vanessa and her 18-year-old daughter Kai Trump stayed in the stands, clapping and cheering. Kai, who is also a junior golfer and committed to the University of Miami, followed the match closely. Even though Woods’ team lost 9-2 to Los Angeles Golf Club, the focus stayed on his return and the support around him.Woods had not played four full rounds since The Masters in April 2024. He has been dealing with recovery since then. Speaking earlier, he shared how tough the process has been. He said, “I said I’ve been working on it. Sometimes I have good days, sometimes I have bad days. Disc replacement is not a lot of fun.”In another update earlier this year, he told ESPN’s Scott Van Pelt, “I’ve been cleared to hit, basically, hit short irons and mid irons. I haven’t gone any beyond that.” He also admitted his game felt “rusty.”Away from the course, Woods has been spending time with Vanessa Trump. In January, she was with him during his 50th birthday celebration, which also marked the 30th anniversary of his TGR Foundation. According to PEOPLE, the event raised around $50 million for charity and was held at The Breakers Palm Beach.A source told PEOPLE, “Tiger was with Vanessa but also busy talking to people he knows from the charity. There was some serious partying going down all night… They seemed to have a great time.”Their relationship was first confirmed in March 2025 by a source close to the Trump family, again reported by PEOPLE. Soon after, the two made it official on Instagram.Now, with Woods back on the course and Vanessa by his side, this return feels different. It is not just about golf anymore. It is also about the people supporting him through it.
Article Summary: Golf legend tiger woods seen with girlfriend vanessa trump in public moment before comeback game as kai trump cheers in stands. The two shared a quick kiss and hug, a moment that caught attention right away. This was a big moment for woods. The 50-year-old golfer had been away from full competition since april 2024.

Article Title: 'I thought of jumping from moving car': Sivaramakrishnan on how racism scars led to depression
Article Text:
Laxman Sivaramakrishnan

Watch EXCLUSIVE: Rahul Dravid on iconic Eden Gardens win against Australia in 2001 EXCLUSIVE: Rahul Dravid on iconic Eden Gardens win against Australia in 2001





Former India leg-spinner Laxman Sivaramakrishnan has opened up about a period when he "didn’t want to see himself in the mirror" and felt he "was going to die", describing a breakdown during his time as a commentator that he links to years of racism and colour-based remarks.Sivaramakrishnan, who played 25 international matches for India in a five-year career, said the struggles became severe during the IPL held in the UAE during the Covid-19 lockdown. “I was down completely and I didn’t want to see myself in the mirror. I would have a couple of drinks and go to sleep because I could not bear anything. Whenever I was awake, I thought I was going to die.”He described how his routine collapsed during that phase. He would shut himself indoors and lose track of time.“Sometimes when we were travelling in Dubai, there’s no speed limit. If the vehicle went very fast, something in my mind would tell me to just open the door and jump out. Somehow, something stopped me from doing anything silly," the former India spinner said while talking to Indian Express.Sleep became difficult, with recurring hallucinations. “You close your eyes, you see images that you can’t imagine. All very frightening.You open your eyes, there’s nothing. But you’re so tired that you want to sleep. You close your eyes for a while, then again, open your eyes. So there goes your sleep.” He said alcohol worsened the situation. “Every time, you manage to tangle yourself tighter and tighter. And you have the whole world outside saying, ‘See, I told you. Liquor is the reason. I told you’.”Sivaramakrishnan said even during his 23-year stint as a commentator, the issue of appearance affected opportunities. “I’ve never done a toss or a presentation. I asked one of the producers why. He said, ‘We have been instructed by our bosses not to put you.’ They said it is to do with me not being presentable.” He added, “The most charismatic and the best in the business is Vijay Amritraj. Is he not dark?”He traced these experiences back to his early years in cricket. At 14, while serving as a net bowler at Chepauk, he recalled being mistaken for ground staff by a senior player. "I just looked at him and said, 'That's none of my business,'” he said, while talking to Indian Express.He also opened up about haunting racism ordeal inside the Indian dressing room.Having previously been part of the Indian team that toured Pakistan, Sivaramakrishnan made his Test debut in Antigua in April 1983, where at 17 years and 118 days was the then youngest player to play Test cricket for India.The former India spinner has revealed he spent more time in the West Indies dressing room during the 1983 tour where he made his debut in the Antigua Test.He said such comments affected his confidence over time. “Because of my darkness, people would dismiss me. There was a sense of hurt every time this happened. I always wanted to forget, forget, forget but deep down, it’s always rooted and it comes out. All these things put me in a position where I had very low self-esteem at a tender age… it is very hard to build confidence.”In contrast, he said he found acceptance during the West Indies tour. He spent time with players like Malcolm Marshall and Desmond Haynes, who took him out regularly. “Everybody’s skin colour was on the darker side. They were very happy people,” he said.He also recalled a conversation with Gordon Greenidge, who spoke about facing similar issues in England. “He had personally told me that this is what I went through in England and that’s why I just mind my business, play my cricket and just go.”
Article Summary: Laxman sivaramakrishnan has opened up about a period when he "didn’t want to see himself in the mirror" and felt he "was going to die" the former india spinner has revealed he spent more time in the west indies dressing room during the 1983 tour where he made his debut in the antigua test.

Article Title: Prithvi Shaw seeks redemption: ‘Humans make mistakes but that’s history’
Article Text:
Prithvi Shaw (Pic credit: Delhi Capitals)

Back in the

IPL

after a year, the

Delhi Capitals

batter seems calmer, more focused, mentally stronger. He says he has learnt from the excesses of the past, which led to the quick crumbling of a once-promising career.

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

Watch Axar Patel questions Impact Player rule: ‘All-rounders lose value’ Axar Patel questions Impact Player rule: ‘All-rounders lose value’





MUMBAI: Wearing the Delhi Capitals jersey at the Ferozeshah Kotla makes Prithvi Shaw feel most at home. Ahead of the IPL season, it’s clear the once-promising batter from Mumbai has shed a few kilograms. His thought process too seems to have acquired a fresh outlook. ‘Axed’ from the IPL last year, he says the break did him a world of good.A flashy engagement ring on his finger seems emblematic of the change.“I went to a couple of places to refresh my mind. It (the IPL snub) was a good break for me. I’ve enjoyed my life a lot. I can’t say that I took a step back,” Prithvi said about going unsold last season.“The break allowed me to strengthen myself mentally. When I came back, it was the same routine.I trained and worked hard. Whatever I used to do earlier, I started doing it three times more,” he said before the Delhi Capitals got busy with their intra-squad practice match here on Wednesday evening.It wasn’t just the IPL axe. Shaw was compelled to move from Mumbai to Maharashtra after the selectors dropped him in the previous season. For a cricket association which had hyped him as a prodigy since he was 13, the axe must have felt like a punch in the gut.“When I was dropped from the Mumbai team for a year, I felt the reason given to me was not a valid one. Even then I just smiled and left. I didn’t speak to the selectors or the president of the association. A lot of offers from other states started coming my way but I chose Maharashtra because it was closer to Mumbai,” he said.Gossip and unwanted headlines have followed Prithvi for a while. He has seen the glitzy highs of cricketing fame and also endured much embarrassment off the field. Now, at 26, will he be able to turn a different corner?“I didn’t write anything about myself. The media did,” he said of all the early hype about his talent. “I’m a human being. I will make mistakes. It’s been many years. I must have made some mistakes in my life,” he stated.As his career started to unravel around four years ago, incessant controversies started to take a toll. Shaw says he has fallen back on a tight circle of associates to be at peace with himself.“Whatever is written outside, people know only the half of it. My family and friends know me. I have kept only as many friends in my life as my fingers. I only train with my childhood coach. I don’t reach out to anyone. If anybody wants to reach out to me, I don’t mind. I was very young, obviously. Whenever there were good or bad things on social media and in newspapers, it started to affect me. Now, I have stopped seeing those things. Now, I believe in myself,” he said.“I know where I come from and how hard I have worked to reach here. Humans make mistakes but that’s history. I feel I am very happy mentally. This (cricket) is my passion. No one can take this away from me. I think sometimes we take ourselves too seriously,” he said with a smile.So is he still nurturing comeback plans? “It will be wrong if I say I’m not thinking about a comeback. I’m playing for that. Who doesn’t want to play for India?” As he was going back to the dressing room for the practice match, Prithvi was asked how he calms his mind. “Nothing. No rituals. No yoga or meditation. Just the engagement ring,” he said, smiling.
Article Summary: Prithvi shaw says he has learnt from the excesses of the past, which led to the quick crumbling of a once-promising career. ‘axed’ from the ipl last year, he says the break did him a world of good. Shaw was compelled to move from mumbai to maharashtra after the selectors dropped him in the previous season.

Article Title: Who is Arnold Schwarzenegger's son Joseph Baena? Making bodybuilding debut at NPC Natural Colorado State competition this weekend
Article Text:
Who is Arnold Schwarzenegger's son Joseph Baena? Making bodybuilding debut at NPC Natural Colorado State competition this weekend (Image via Getty)

Joseph Baena follows Arnold Schwarzenegger’s legacy while carving his own path in bodybuilding debut





Joseph Baena is finally ready to step onto a bodybuilding stage, and this time it is not just for social media. The 28-year-old son of Arnold Schwarzenegger will make his first official appearance at the NPC Natural Colorado State competition this Saturday. According to TMZ Sports, this marks his real entry into competitive bodybuilding after years of training and sharing his progress online. For a long time, people have been asking if Joseph would follow his father’s path. Now that moment is here. He has spent years building his body, learning posing, and working on his routine. Recent videos shared by TMZ Sports show him preparing closely for the event, giving fans a clear sign that he is taking this seriously.Joseph Baena established himself as a significant figure in the fitness industry. He appeared on the cover of Men's Health in March 2022 to discuss his training methods and his way of living. He has been sharing his workout, diet and his everyday activities through posts to his followers which he uses to reach his current fitness goal.Joseph Baena has always looked a lot like Arnold Schwarzenegger, and fans have noticed it for years.Still, he chose not to use the Schwarzenegger name and kept his mother Mildred Baena’s surname. In past interviews, he made it clear he wanted to build his own identity and not depend on his father’s fame.At the same time, Arnold Schwarzenegger has played a big role behind the scenes. TMZ Sports reports that the seven-time Mr. Olympia winner has been helping his son with training tips and guidance as he gets ready for the stage. Having someone with that level of experience has clearly helped Joseph sharpen his preparation.This competition is different from his earlier fitness content. It is not just about lifting weights or posting photos. It is about standing in front of judges, showing discipline, and proving he belongs in the sport. His physique, often compared to his father’s early days, will now be tested in a real contest setting.Joseph Baena’s debut also answers a question fans have had for years. He is no longer just training quietly or hinting at competing. He is stepping into the spotlight and taking that first real step in bodybuilding.
Article Summary: Joseph baena will make his bodybuilding debut at the npc natural colorado state competition this saturday. He has been sharing his workout, diet and his everyday activities through posts to his followers which he uses to reach his current fitness goal. Arnold schwarzenegger has been helping his son with training tips and guidance as he gets ready.

Article Title: Bts World Tour Schedule: Is BTS performing at the Super Bowl? J-Hope’s comments spark hope among fans
Article Text:
Image - X

J-Hope names Super Bowl Halftime Show as dream stage as BTS dominates 2027 polls



Watch 왜 내 맘을 흔드는 건데 (BTS 제이홉, SWIM) | 카니를 찾아서 EP.40 [EN] 왜 내 맘을 흔드는 건데 (BTS 제이홉, SWIM) | 카니를 찾아서 EP.40 [EN]





Forget the Vince Lombardi Trophy, the real prize at the Super Bowl might soon be a 12-minute set from the "Prince of Pop" himself. Just now, BTS’s sunshine-in-human-form, J-Hope, sent the internet into a full-blown meltdown during an interview with Kany Diabaté. When asked about his ultimate "dream stage," Hobi didn’t hesitate for a second. His answer? The Super Bowl Halftime Show.While some might see this as a casual "that would be cool" comment, the timing suggests something much bigger is brewing. Last month, Bad Bunny absolutely crushed the Super Bowl LX Halftime Show. By doing a high-energy, primarily Spanish-language set, he proved that the NFL and Roc Nation are done playing it safe. The "global superstar" era is officially here, and who is more global than BTS?BTS just made their massive group return on March 21 with the "Arirang" concert on Netflix.The show was directed by Hamish Hamilton, the literal architect behind the most iconic Super Bowl shows of the last decade. The "Super Bowl quality" production is already in their DNA.In a recent Billboard poll for the 2027 headliner, BTS didn't just win, they dominated, pulling in over 85% of the vote, leaving names like Taylor Swift and Justin Bieber in the dust.There is one hilarious logistical snag. Super Bowl LXI is set for February 14, 2027, at SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles.According to their current "Arirang World Tour" schedule, BTS is supposed to be in Melbourne, Australia, on February 12 and 13.Unless the guys have mastered teleportation (which, let’s be honest, wouldn't surprise us), they’d have to do some serious schedule-shuffling. But given the scale and following, if the NFL calls, you answer even if it means a very long flight from Down Under to LA, which we obviously wouldn't mind.Imagine the lights go down at SoFi Stadium, the opening notes of "Butter" or "Mic Drop" hit, and seven of the world’s best performers descend from the roof. With J-Hope as the "Performance Director" of the group, we know the choreography would be historic and one people will remember for a long long time.As Hobi said in the interview, he can "only imagine" what that energy feels like. ARMY, on the other hand, doesn't have to imagine, they’re already manifesting it and so are we.
Article Summary: J-hope said the super bowl halftime show would be his "dream stage" bts won a recent billboard poll for the 2027 headliner. The super bowl lxi is set for february 14, 2027, at sofi stadium in los angeles.

Article Title: Radko Gudas: "I've got to learn": Radko Gudas finally breaks silence after suspension for hitting Maple Leafs captain Auston Matthews
Article Text:
Toronto Maple Leafs Auston Matthews (34) and Anaheim Ducks Radko Gudas (7) battle for the puck during second period NHL hockey action (Image via Nathan Denette/The Canadian Press via AP)

Radko Gudas expresses regret over the brutal knee-to-knee hit that injured Auston Matthews

Watch Radko Gudas on suspension: "Didn’t like the point of contact either. Never want to see anybody hurt" Radko Gudas on suspension: "Didn’t like the point of contact either. Never want to see anybody hurt"





Anaheim Ducks captain Radko Gudas has spoken publicly for the first time after receiving a five-game suspension for the knee-to-knee hit that injured Toronto Maple Leafs captain Auston Matthews, who had to undergo surgery to repair his torn MCL, sidelining him for the remainder of the season.Following the incident and the suspension controversy, Radko Gudas has finally expressed regret over the knee-on-knee hit, acknowledging he must improve his play. As per earlier reports, the collision occurred on March 12 during a game between the Ducks and the Maple Leafs, when Gudas’ knee made contact with Matthews, resulting in a serious knee injury. The NHL Player Safety Department took the matter into cognisance and reviewed it.They later handed Gudas a five-game suspension, which several prominent NHL figures expressed dissatisfaction with.Following the five-game suspension controversy for hitting Auston Matthews, Anaheim Ducks captain Radko Gudas has expressed his regret over the brutal hit that injured Maple Leafs captain Auston Matthews. He has finally acknowledged that he must improve his play.Unfortunately, Matthews suffered a Grade 3 MCL tear and quad contusion on the knee-on-knee play with Gudas, an injury severe enough to rule him out for the rest of the 2025-26 regular season.Reports suggest that he underwent an MCL knee repair surgery on Thursday, with the Maple Leafs announcing that he faces a recovery timeline of approximately 12 weeks.Speaking to the Athletic, Gudas expressed his deep regret. The Ducks captain stated, "I really hate the way it ended up, the point of contact. I'm not a fan of that. I never want to injure anybody out there. It's a hard-fought game. It's just, yeah, I never want to go out there and hurt anybody. I feel terrible about the outcome. I just committed to the play, and unfortunately, that was the point of contact."Gudas admitted that he will never commit any such mistake again. The player even reached out to Auston Matthews and said he never wants to see anybody get hurt, and it feels terrible. “I never want to go out there and hurt anybody. It's very unfortunate. I reached out to him, too. We spoke. I never want to see anybody get hurt, so I feel very terrible about that,” he emphasized his remorse over the outcome.Earlier, following the incident, the NHL’s Department of Player Safety imposed a five-game suspension on the Anaheim Ducks defenseman Radko Gudas. According to reports, he forfeited $104,166.65 in salary during the suspension.However, reports suggest he made his return from the suspension on Tuesday night, as Anaheim locked horns with the Vancouver Canucks, where the Ducks won by 5-3.
Article Summary: Anaheim ducks captain radko gudas has spoken publicly for the first time after receiving a five-game suspension for the knee-to-knee hit that injured toronto maple leafs captain auston matthews. Matthews suffered a grade 3 mcl tear and quad contusion, an injury severe enough to rule him out for the rest of the 2025-26 regular season.

Article Title: Calais Campbell: New York Giants and Buffalo Bills tied to $150 million Arizona Cardinals defensive tackle
Article Text:
(Image via Getty: New York Giants logo and Arizona Cardinals logo)

NFL Trade Rumors : Giants and Bills linked to Cardinals DT Calais Campbell

Arizona DT Calais Campbell could be paired with New York DT Dexter Lawrence

Cardinals veteran could be ideal for Bills new DC Jim Leonhard





Despite being 40 before the 2026 campaign, Arizona Cardinals defensive tackle Calais Campbell is a fearsome interior presence. FanSided’s Lior Lampert reports the ageless wonder could be a golden opportunity for the John Harbaugh-led New York Giants to address their defensive line shortcomings.Sports Illustrated’s Alex Brasky reports there are four moves that the Josh Allen-led Buffalo Bills need to make before the 2026 NFL Draft. One of them is adding a defensive tackle. It could either be Detroit Lions DT DJ Reader or Cardinals DT Calais Campbell. If Buffalo wants high-quality veteran talent, then it may have to pay more for Campbell.The 39-year-old Arizona DT played college football for the Miami Hurricanes between 2004 and 2007.The Cardinals drafted him in the 2008 NFL Draft as the second-round, 50th overall pick. He played nine seasons for them.In 2017, when he became an unrestricted free agent, several teams showed interest in signing him; one of them won: the Jacksonville Jaguars. He played three seasons for them. However, in 2020, Jacksonville traded Campbell to Baltimore for a 2020 fifth-round pick. Three seasons later, the Ravens released him.In March 2023, he signed a one-year, $7M contract with the Atlanta Falcons. In June 2024, he signed a one-year, $2M contract with the Miami Dolphins. In April 2025, he signed a one-year, $5.5M contract with his parent franchise, Arizona.Now, it’s been two weeks into free agency, and the Cardinals have not re-signed him; he remains a free agent. But analysts are still predicting him for different teams [Buffalo, New York, and Las Vegas]. One reason? His impeccable stats.In 2025 alone, the DT recorded 43 total tackles [23 solo], 16 QB hits, 6.5 sacks, and two passes defended over 17 games.His overall stats are 960 total tackles [674 solo], 282 QB hits, 117.0 sacks, 18 forced fumbles, 13 fumble recoveries, three interceptions, and 65 passes defended over 278 games in 18 seasons. He is one of the seven active players with 100-plus career sacks.FanSided’s Lior Lampert reports Campbell shows no signs of slowing down. He has proven to be fruitful at every stop of his nearly two-decade-long NFL career. He could be a difference maker for the Jaxson Dart-led Giants. Especially when paired with two-time All-Pro Dexter Lawrence, the duo could become a matchup nightmare for opponents.Lampert further states that New York’s talented front seven could take some of the burden off Campbell’s shoulders and keep him fresh, and that the situation can be reversed.As for the Bills, they need help with their interior. Locked on Bills host Joe Marino reports Campbell is a highly effective and solid option for Buffalo as a team leader, especially now when the team is going to transition to a new 3-4 scheme under first-year defensive coordinator Jim Leonhard. Leonhard served as an assistant head coach and pass game coordinator with the Bo Nix-led Denver Broncos during the 2025 season.Anyhow, Marino further states that Campbell is not young, but he played in all 17 games like he does every year. He recorded 49% of snaps, six and a half sacks, 33 pressures, and 24 run stuffs. “The appeal here is that it’s Calais fr**king Campbell. He’s an absolute dude,” Marino said.According to Spotrac, the Arizona DT is projected to sign a one-year, $10.9M contract, giving him an average annual salary of $10.9M. His total career earnings over 18 years are $150M.Would it be the Giants, the Bills, or perhaps the Las Vegas Raiders to sign this legendary defensive tackle? Only time will tell…
Article Summary: Arizona cardinals defensive tackle calais campbell is a free agent. The 39-year-old is projected to sign a one-year, $10.9m contract with the cardinals. Campbell could be a perfect fit for the new york giants and buffalo bills.

Article Title: Puka Nacua: What is behind Puka Nacua’s widespread criticism? Rams wide receiver faces backlash after livestream drama and referee issues
Article Text:
What is behind Puka Nacua criticism? Rams wide receiver faces backlash after livestream drama and referee issues (Image viua Getty)



How Puka Nacua’s livestream moments, referee comments, and off-field issues changed fan perception





Puka Nacua has gone from being one of the most loved young stars in the NFL to someone many fans are now upset with. The Los Angeles Rams wide receiver had a dream rookie season and quickly became a fan favorite. But over the past year, things have changed fast. A mix of on-camera moments, social media behavior, and off-field issues has hurt his image. Many fans now feel disappointed, and that shift has made him one of the most talked-about and criticized players in the league right now.It all started when some of his public actions began to raise questions. Fans who once praised his focus and humble attitude now feel he has lost that same energy.Instead of just talking about his game, people are now talking about everything happening around him. That change has been hard to ignore.One major turning point came in December 2025 during a livestream with Adin Ross. During that stream, Puka Nacua agreed to take part in a touchdown dance that many people online called offensive. Around the same time, older comments linked to him also came back into discussion. These moments quickly spread across social media and led to strong reactions from fans.Not long after that, he also spoke about NFL referees during the same livestream. He said referees make calls just so they can tell their friends they were on TV. Later, after a loss to the Seattle Seahawks, he posted messages online that seemed to mock officials. The NFL fined him $25,000 for that.Away from the field, more stories added to the situation. He was called out online after talking about a skydiving date with actress Sydney Sweeney, which many people later said was not true. Fans began accusing him of trying to get attention.His social media presence also became a talking point. He was often seen spending time with influencers, and some fans started questioning if he was staying focused on football. At the same time, reports about family issues, including his brother’s legal trouble, also added to the noise.There was also a serious allegation involving a personal dispute, which brought more negative attention. While details remain unclear, the report itself led to more criticism online.Despite all this, Puka Nacua’s performance on the field has remained strong. He finished the 2025 season with 1,715 receiving yards, showing he is still one of the top wide receivers in the game. But right now, his image is not defined by stats. It is defined by everything happening around him.The 2026 season now feels very important for him. Fans are watching closely to see if he can move past these issues and rebuild trust.
Article Summary: Rams wide receiver had a dream rookie season and quickly became a fan favorite. But over the past year, things have changed fast. A mix of on-camera moments, social media behavior, and off-field issues has hurt his image. Many fans now feel disappointed, and that shift has made him one of the most criticized players in the league right now.

Article Title: Max Verstappen: Dan Ticktum backs Max Verstappen over F1 battery issues: “This is why he has to go and do GT racing”
Article Text:
Dan Ticktum (Image credit: Instagram)

Dan Ticktum agrees with Max Verstappen on new F1 cars

Dan Ticktum on finishing fourth at Madrid E-Prix







Dan Ticktum is the latest Formula E driver to speak out in defence of Max Verstappen while criticising the use of batteries in modern F1 hybrid cars. The Cupra Kiro driver spoke to the media after finishing fourth at the Madrid E-Prix. The Formula E driver described pre-race battery charging in F1 as “rubbish” and explained why Verstappen has shown increasing interest in GT racing.At the Madrid E-Prix, Dan Ticktum did not hold back while discussing the current F1 regulations. He told talkSPORT, “Run out of battery halfway down a straight, they have to charge the battery before they start - it’s just rubbish, it’s absolute rubbish.”Commenting on Max Verstappen’s vocal criticism of the new F1 cars, Ticktum added, “I’m a BTEC version of him unfortunately in this sport, but he says what he thinks, whether it’s right or wrong.I have to say I agree with a lot of what he says, certainly on some points in F1, which is why he has to go off and do GT racing, so he can actually enjoy racing. Not everyone will say it, but everyone’s thinking what I’m thinking.”When asked by a fan whether he would also move into GT racing, Ticktum replied: “Hopefully very soon.”Responding to another fan comment that read, “Nothing about F1 is eco-friendly… just accept it and run some V10s” — Ticktum said: “Correct.V8s produced 250 tonnes of CO2 a year. Current engines 150 tonnes. Sounds good. Then you learn air freight alone is 250,000 tonnes. So they sacrifice the sport for less than 1% of the total emissions. Just utter bollocks.”Many fans echoed his views. “Dan is for the people and we love it,” wrote one. “Always love Dan… talking facts,” said another. A third fan added: “I hate the new regulations. Dan Ticktum is spot on.” Another comment read: “GT racing and prototypes are far more exciting than F1.”After topping the free practice sessions, Dan Ticktum battled closely with Jaguar TCS Racing’s Mitch Evans and Porsche’s Pascal Wehrlein in the race but narrowly missed out on a podium finish, crossing the line in fourth place.He took the result in stride and wrote on Instagram: “P4 in Madrid! Good job from everyone at @kiroraceco. A great event. Thank you to all the fans who came out - it was a really good showing and a great event for the sport. Well done to all at @fiaformulae and @cupra_official who made it happen.”Also read: Antonio Felix da Costa handled family arrangements himself for Madrid E-Prix: “I’m glad it paid off”
Article Summary: Formula e driver dan ticktum has spoken out in defence of max verstappen. The cupra kiro driver finished fourth at the madrid e-prix. He described pre-race battery charging in f1 as 'rubbish'

Article Title: Ryan Clark: Ryan Clark questions Cam Newton loyalty after Jason Whitlock takes shots at Stephen A Smith on podcast
Article Text:
Ryan Clark questions Cam Newton loyalty after Jason Whitlock takes shots at Stephen A Smith on podcast (Image via Getty)

Ryan Clark questions Cam Newton’s decision after Jason Whitlock podcast comments on Stephen A. Smith





Ryan Clark did not stay quiet after a recent podcast moment started getting attention online. The former NFL player, who now appears on First Take, shared a strong message about loyalty, and many believe it was aimed directly at his colleague Cam Newton. The issue began when Cam Newton invited Jason Whitlock on his “4th & 1” podcast. During that long talk, Whitlock spoke openly and criticized Stephen A. Smith. That did not sit well with people connected to the show, especially since Stephen A. Smith and Cam Newton work together on First Take.Soon after, Ryan Clark reacted on social media platform X. His message was short but very clear, and it quickly spread online. Without naming anyone directly, his words pointed at the situation many fans were already discussing.Clark wrote, “If someone shows you love, has you on ‘their’ show twice a week… at least. You don’t bring his known enemy on your show and allow your guest to talk about person. That’s not G at all. Loyalty is at a minimum these days.”His words made fans think about what loyalty means between coworkers, especially when they share the same platform.Ryan Clark’s reaction has added more attention to an already tense situation.While Cam Newton has built his own space with his podcast, his role on First Take makes things more complicated. Many viewers now feel that inviting someone who openly criticizes a colleague crosses a line.At the same time, Cam Newton has not publicly responded to Ryan Clark’s message. He also has not addressed the criticism from Jason Whitlock’s comments about Stephen A. Smith.This has left fans with questions. Will this affect Cam Newton’s role on First Take? Will Stephen A. Smith speak about this on air? So far, there has been no official statement from ESPN.The situation shows how fast things can change when media personalities work across different platforms. One decision outside a show can still impact relationships inside it.For now, Ryan Clark’s message stands as the strongest public reaction from within the First Take group. His focus on “loyalty” has clearly struck a chord with fans who follow these personalities closely.
Article Summary: Ryan clark questions cam newton loyalty after jason whitlock takes shots at stephen a smith on podcast. Clark wrote, “if someone shows you love, has you on ‘their’ show twice a week… at least. That’s not g at all.”

Article Title: Antonio Felix Da Costa: Antonio Felix da Costa handled family arrangements himself for Madrid E-Prix: “I’m glad it paid off”
Article Text:
Antonio Felix da Costa won Madrid E-Prix. (Image credit: Instagram)

Antonio Felix da Costa had family and friends cheering him on in Madrid

Carlos Sainz and Kelly Piquet hail Antonio Felix da Costa







Antonio Felix da Costa is the only Formula E driver this season to have secured back-to-back victories. After moving to Jaguar TCS Racing from Porsche, the 34-year-old has been in fine form and ensured his 150th race at the maiden Madrid E-Prix was a special one. What made it even more memorable was the presence of his family and friends, who travelled to Madrid to watch him race. Da Costa has now revealed that he was personally in charge of organising everything for them, from arranging tickets to sorting out merchandise.Antonio Felix Da Costa followed up his Jeddah victory with another win in Madrid. Joining him on the podium was his Jaguar teammate Mitch Evans, who pushed him hard in the closing stages of the race.Reflecting on the experience of racing in front of his loved ones, Da Costa told FormulaE.com, “Honestly, it’s a dream day. To win in front of so much of my family, they see me leave the house and come back, sometimes happy, sometimes sad, sometimes healthy, sometimes not so healthy, and they only hear about it or we discuss it at the dinner table. But they were here today and don’t often get to see me race. So to do it in front of them is just amazing.I’m very happy with that and, you know, I am an emotional guy and today we just took it up a notch.”Speaking about his mother, who was seen waving the Portuguese flag during the race, he added, “My mum is a real character. I’m just so happy to see her enjoying it and happy to provide her with these moments, and everyone else. It was a busy week for me as I had to take care of all their tickets and merchandise. I had to do all of that myself, so I’m glad it paid off and everyone looked good. Now we can celebrate together.”After his second consecutive win this season, Antonio Felix Da Costa shared pictures from his podium celebrations. He captioned the post in Portuguese: “WE WON IN MADRID!!!! I have no words. Moments like today - the happiness is indescribable!”From Williams driver Carlos Sainz to Max Verstappen’s partner Kelly Piquet, several figures reacted to his post with applause emojis. Dan Ticktum commented: “Congrats, good job, old chap!” The Cupra Kiro rookie also added: “Congrats, champ!”Da Costa is currently fourth in the 2026 Formula E Drivers’ Standings with 64 points. One more victory could propel him to the top, where his former teammate Pascal Wehrlein currently leads with 83 points.Also read: Mitch Evans says he should have won the race, in place of Jaguar teammate Antonio Felix da Costa: “Team got the result they wanted”
Article Summary: Antonio felix da costa won the maiden madrid e-prix on sunday. It was the 34-year-old's 150th race for jaguar tcs racing. He is the only formula e driver this season to have secured back-to-back victories. His family and friends travelled to madrid to watch him race.

Article Title: Mikaela Shiffrin: Mikaela Shiffrin wins record-equalling sixth Grand Crystal Globe after dominating Milano Cortina Winter Olympics 2026
Article Text:
Mikaela Shiffrin (via Getty Images)

Mikaela Shiffrin matches legendary record with Austrian legend Annemarie Moser-Pröhl with sixth title







Olympic champion Mikaela Shiffrin ended the 2025-26 Alpine Skiing World Cup season on a historic note. The American star secured her sixth overall Crystal Globe title after finishing 11th in the women’s giant slalom at the World Cup Finals in Lillehammer. Her consistent performances throughout the season helped her collect 1,410 points. This placed her ahead of Germany’s Emma Aicher, who finished second overall with 1,323 points after a crucial final race.Shiffrin’s victory came despite not finishing on the podium in the final event. Her closest rival Aicher needed a win to challenge for the title but could only finish 12th after a late mistake. This result confirmed Shiffrin as the overall champion once again.The season also included her remarkable return to Olympic glory, where she won a gold medal in slalom at the Milano Cortina 2026 Winter Games.Mikaela Shiffrin delivered one of the most dominant seasons in Alpine skiing history. She equalled the record of Austrian legend Annemarie Moser-Pröhl by winning her sixth overall Crystal Globe. Shiffrin had earlier claimed the title in 2017, 2018, 2019, 2022, and 2023. Her latest triumph further strengthened her position as the most successful skier of all time.The American skier showed exceptional consistency throughout the season. She dominated the slalom discipline by winning nine out of ten races. This incredible run played a major role in building an unassailable lead in the standings. Shiffrin now holds a record 110 World Cup wins and 168 podium finishes, numbers that continue to set her apart from the rest of the field.Her success was not limited to the World Cup circuit. During the break for the Winter Olympics, she delivered another top performance. She claimed her third Olympic gold medal in slalom. This marked her first Olympic title since 2018.Canada’s Valerie Grenier won the final giant slalom race of the season, recording her third career victory. Norway’s Mina Fürst Holtmann finished second, while Austria’s Julia Scheib secured third place. However, all eyes remained on Shiffrin and her historic achievement.Reflecting on her season, Shiffrin said the title meant a lot to her and her team. She said that the trophy represented months of effort, teamwork, and determination. She also praised Emma Aicher for her outstanding performances. Shiffrin added that she felt thankful and emotional to finish the season at the top after such a tough and competitive battle.
Article Summary: Mikaela shiffrin won her sixth overall crystal globe title. She equalled the record of austrian legend annemarie moser-pröhl. The american skier showed exceptional consistency throughout the season. She dominated the slalom discipline by winning nine out of ten races.

Article Title: Jonathan Quick: NHL player update: Will Jonathan Quick join the lineup against the Toronto Maple Leafs following his injury?
Article Text:
Jonathan Quick is expected to join the New York Rangers lineup against the Toronto Maple Leafs on March 25, 2026 (Image via NHL)

Is Jonathan Quick returning to the ice for the New York Rangers against the Maple?

Watch Rangers' Jonathan Quick Makes Sprawling Saves to Rob Two Blue Jackets Forwards Rangers' Jonathan Quick Makes Sprawling Saves to Rob Two Blue Jackets Forwards





As the New York Rangers are all set to lock horns against the Toronto Maple Leafs on Wednesday, the latest update on Jonathan Quick could significantly impact the New York Rangers goaltending situation as the team heads into a critical stretch this season.The goaltender, who was previously listed day-to-day due to his lower-body injury, was seen attending the practice session before the match on Wednesday, hinting at his possible return to the game. But speculations are doing the rounds about whether Quick will join the lineup today.In the 2025–26 season, Quick has played 23 games, recording 5 wins and 2 shutouts, with a 3.18 goals-against average and an .889 save percentage.These numbers are noticeably below his career standards and reflect the struggles the veteran netminder has faced this season.Apart from this, in his entire career, Quick has played 827 career games, registering 409 wins and 65 shutouts, along with 2.51 career goals-against average and a .910 save percentage, establishing himself as one of the prominent goaltenders in the league.Jonathan Quick is back on the ice, but he is not returning to play yet for the New York Rangers , as reported by the club on Wednesday. Though he returned to the ice, marking a positive step in his recovery from an upper-body injury.However, he is not ready to appear for the lineup today, unfortunately.Meanwhile, head coach Mike Sullivan also confirmed that the veteran goaltender is not yet ready to rejoin the lineup, saying the netminder is “not there yet” but is “getting closer.” Though Rangers got a positive sign, avoiding a big injury blow to the lineup, Sullivan made one thing clear that the finish line still isn't here.Earlier, Quick exited practice early on Sunday due to an upper-body issue and has missed at least two games, including Monday's matchup against Ottawa and Sunday's home game versus Winnipeg. In his absence, the Rangers recalled Dylan Garand from AHL Hartford as backup support.According to the NHL , Jonathan Quick signed with the New York Rangers as a free agent on July 1, 2023. He recorded an 11-7-2 record with a 3.17 goals-against average and a .893 save percentage in 24 games during his second season with the team, including three shutouts.Reports suggest that he played his 800th career game on March 2 against Nashville, becoming the 17th goaltender in NHL history to reach that milestone. Quick also earned his 400th career win on February 2 against Vegas, and his 404 career wins rank 13th all-time in NHL history. As of now, Quick’s return remains day-to-day, but his presence back on the ice is a strong sign that a return may not be far away.
Article Summary: Jonathan quick is expected to join the new york rangers lineup against the toronto maple leafs on march 25, 2026. The goaltender, who was previously listed day-to-day due to his lower-body injury, was seen attending the practice session before the match. Quick exited practice early on sunday due to an upper-body issue and has missed at least two games.

Article Title: Michael Jordan: Fact Check: Is Michael Jordan becoming UNC’s head coach? Viral rumor debunked
Article Text:
Michael Jordan. Image via: AP

No, Michael Jordan is not taking over UNC basketball despite viral jet rumors



does





If you’ve been on X in the last 24 hours, you’ve likely seen the "Breaking News": Michael Jordan ’s custom, elephant-print Gulfstream G650ER has touched down in Chapel Hill. The rumor? His Airness is meeting with UNC Athletics Director Bubba Cunningham at 2:00 PM to become the next head coach of the Tar Heels.It’s the perfect story. It’s cinematic. It’s also… complete satire. While the internet was ready to order "Coach Jordan" whistles, let’s perform a quick autopsy on this viral moment to see what was real and what was just a high-flying prank.The Fact: Michael Jordanown a $70M Gulfstream G650ER. It is a masterpiece of aviation, sporting the Jumpman logo and a paint job that matches his shoes. The Fiction: Just because the plane is in North Carolina doesn't mean a job interview is happening.Jordan lives in Florida but has deep business roots in NC. His plane landing in the state is about as rare as seeing a Toyota Camry at a grocery store.The Fact: There is a massive power vacuum at UNC. Following the dismissal of Hubert Davis on March 24, 2026, the Tar Heels are officially hunting for a new leader. The Fiction: The "2:00 PM meeting" is a classic hallmark of sports satire. It provides a specific time to create urgency, making you refresh your feed every thirty seconds.In reality, Michael Jordan has spent the last two decades in owner suites and on golf courses not drawing up "horns" sets in a film room.Satire works best when it tickles our imagination. The idea of the greatest player of all time returning to save his struggling alma mater is the ultimate sports movie plot. Plus, with MJ recently selling his majority stake in the Charlotte Hornets, he technically has the "free time."But let’s be real: recruiting 17-year-olds in the era of the Transfer Portal and NIL is a 24/7 grind. Jordan is a billionaire who enjoys his cigars and privacy; the "coaching life" isn't exactly a vacation.While the "insider" report was a clever bit of fiction, the search for a real coach is very much on. UNC is likely looking at proven tactical minds like Nate Oats or Todd Golden to restore the program’s glory.MJ might be the GOAT, but for now, his only role at the Dean Dome will be as the most famous fan in the building.
Article Summary: Michael jordan's gulfstream g650er touched down in chapel hill, north carolina. The rumor was that jordan would meet with unc athletics director bubba cunningham. The "2:00 pm meeting" is a classic hallmark of sports satire. The search for a real coach is very much on.

Article Title: Aryna Sabalenka: Aryna Sabalenka viral Golden Glizzy reaction steals show after Miami Open win over Zheng Qinwen
Article Text:
Aryna Sabalenka viral Golden Glizzy reaction steals show after Miami Open win over Zheng Qinwen (Image via Getty)

Aryna Sabalenka beats Zheng Qinwen and eyes Sunshine Double as she faces Hailey Baptiste next





Aryna Sabalenka kept her strong run going at the Miami Open with a straight-sets win and then gave fans a fun moment right after. The world No. 1 beat Zheng Qinwen 6-3, 6-4 to move into the quarter-finals in Florida. She looked in control for most of the match and did not let the pressure build. Moments after the win, she was stopped by the WTA media team for a quick video. That is when things took a funny turn. Sabalenka was handed a luxury hot dog, known as the “Golden Glizzy,” and her reaction quickly grabbed attention online. She was clearly hungry after the match and did not hold back. Smiling and surprised, she thanked the team and took a big bite.Then she said, “It’s so f***ing good, guys. Oh my God. And I’m so hungry, that’s my recovery. Thank you!” The short clip spread fast on social media and added a light moment to her serious title push in Miami.On court, Aryna Sabalenka showed why she is still the player to beat. Zheng Qinwen tried to fight back, but Sabalenka stayed steady and kept her shots deep and powerful. After the match, she said, “She’s a tough opponent and I’m super happy with the level I played at today.I can definitely say that it felt like home. Thanks to you guys, you really make this stadium feel like home for me.”This win keeps Sabalenka on track for the “Sunshine Double,” a rare feat where a player wins both Indian Wells and the Miami Open in the same season. She already lifted the Indian Wells title last week, showing strong form at the right time.Her next match will be against American player Hailey Baptiste. Baptiste has also had a good run, beating strong names like Elina Svitolina and Jelena Ostapenko. This sets up an interesting clash, with Sabalenka as the favorite but Baptiste playing with confidence.The Miami draw is still packed with big names. Players like Elena Rybakina, Coco Gauff, Jessica Pegula, and Karolina Muchova are all still in the tournament. That means Sabalenka’s path will not be easy if she wants the title.Off the court, Sabalenka has also had a big month. She recently got engaged to Georgios Frangulis. Since then, her form has only improved, and she looks focused and relaxed at the same time.For now, her mix of strong tennis and fun personality is winning fans everywhere.
Article Summary: Aryna sabalenka beat zheng qinwen 6-3, 6-4 to reach the miami open quarter-finals. The world no. 1 was handed a luxury hot dog, known as the ‘golden glizzy,’ and her reaction quickly grabbed attention online.

Article Title: Taylor Swift Wedding Details: Taylor Swift reaches a new high as Travis Kelce faces a testing period in his life weeks ahead of their wedding
Article Text:
Taylor Swift marks a new milestone in her life as Travis Kelce faces issues in his career weeks ahead of their lavish wedding.(Image via Getty Images)

Taylor Swift marks a record breaking achievement as Travis Kelce battles a tough phase in his career

Travis Kelce is standing strong beside Taylor Swift as she faces the pressure of the media leaks







Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are all set to get married in the next few weeks as billions of fans around the world await more wedding details.As Travis Kelce has signed a new deal with the Kansas City Chiefs for a whopping $54.7 million, it seems the billionaire pop star, Taylor Swift, has marked a new milestone in her career.A few hours ago, as per Forbes, Taylor Swift’s new hit track, Elizabeth Taylor, has broken all records as it debuted at the 30th rank on the Pop Airplay Chart. This has led to Taylor Swift earning her 50th win on the Pop Airplay chart.Taylor Swift now joins billionaire entrepreneur and artist Rihanna as the second musician in the world to score 50 placements between 1 and 40.Over the last few months, Taylor Swift has marked new milestones in her career as her net worth recently crossed a whopping $2 billion.While there is a significant difference between Taylor Swift and her soon to be husband, Travis Kelce’s net worth, the star player has been facing a few issues in his career.On one hand, his expensive contract extension with the Kansas City Chiefs has raised many eyebrows across the league as many insiders and fans feel that he “does not deserve it”, while others root for his performance in the next season.Amid all the mess, Travis Kelce’s co-owned restaurant 1587 Prime has recently found itself in a mess after a woman left a derogatory remark on their food quality and staff.The review has gone viral across social media sites as many customers have joined in on shading Travis Kelce and Patrick Mahomes’ expensive restaurant, 1587 Prime.However, it seems the Kansas City Chiefs’ star player and tight end, Travis Kelce, is keeping himself away from all the noise as he tries to focus on planning his wedding to the billionaire pop star, Taylor Swift.Recently, as per reports, sources close to the high profile couple have revealed that Taylor Swift is reportedly facing a lot of stress as many of the details about their wedding have been leaked to the media.This includes their possible venue and even the date that the couple have zeroed in. As Taylor Swift goes through “sleepless nights”, Travis Kelce stands strong beside her.
Article Summary: Taylor swift marks a new milestone in her life as travis kelce faces issues in his career weeks ahead of their lavish wedding. Taylor swift’s new hit track, elizabeth taylor, has broken all records as it debuted at the 30th rank on the pop airplay chart.

Article Title: Jannik Sinner: Jannik Sinner survives Alex Michelsen scare after awkward net moment to seal Miami Open quarterfinal spot
Article Text:
Jannik Sinner survives Alex Michelsen scare after awkward net moment to seal Miami Open quarterfinal spot (Image via Getty)

Jannik Sinner accidentally hits Alex Michelsen at net before holding nerve to win tight Miami Open battle





Jannik Sinner had to really fight on court, but he still got the job done at the Miami Open. The World No. 1 beat Alex Michelsen in straight sets, 7-5, 7-6(4), to move into the quarterfinals. It was not an easy win. Both sets were very close, and Michelsen kept pushing till the end. In the middle of all that pressure, one moment stood out. Sinner hit a fast shot straight at Michelsen at the net, and it caught everyone’s attention. It was not on purpose, but it still created an awkward pause in an otherwise tight match.Even with that moment, Sinner stayed calm and focused. He held his serve in big points and managed the tiebreak better.That made the difference in the end, as he closed out the match in two sets without letting it go to a third.About 30 minutes into the first set, the match took a sudden turn. Alex Michelsen hit a strong serve and quickly moved to the net, trying to take control of the point. Jannik Sinner reacted fast and returned the ball low, right near Michelsen’s feet.That forced Alex Michelsen into a weak position. He had to lift the ball up, and that gave Jannik Sinner a clear chance.Sinner ran forward and smashed the ball across the court. The shot ended up hitting Michelsen’s racket at close range.Alex Michelsen looked surprised because he had already turned slightly away. Sinner quickly said sorry, and both players shared a small smile at the net. The moment passed quickly, but it showed how fast things happen in tennis.Even though the ball landed out, it touched Michelsen’s racket first, so the point went to Sinner. Soon after, Sinner took the first set 7-5.After the match, Sinner spoke honestly about his performance. He said, “I felt like the serve helped me quite a lot today, especially in important moments and in the tie-break, so I’m happy about that.”He also admitted he still needs to improve. “At the same time, I know that if I want to go far in this tournament, I have to improve from the back of the court.”Jannik Sinner also gave respect to Michelsen. “It was very close. A very close match against Alex. He’s a tough opponent, so I’m very happy.”Now, Sinner moves into the quarterfinals, where he will face Frances Tiafoe. That match will decide who goes into the final four.
Article Summary: Jannik sinner beat alex michelsen 7-5, 7-6(4), at the miami open. The world no. 1 will face frances tiafoe in the quarterfinals. Sinner hit a fast shot straight at michelsen at the net, and it caught everyone's attention.
